title: PvP Pack - Unified
description: Fully built for vanilla, this is an all-in-one PvP pack to boost your combat gameplay and the awareness of your surroundings.
body:
[![PVP PACK UNIFIED](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e8b2e40daa6c5a02a43d5c516419725b489434d.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pvp-pack-unified)

![Divider](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/divider_faded/Divider_03.png)

[<center>![Discord Button](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/social_buttons_icon/Discord-Button-64.png)](https://discord.gg/FVH3GaMHJz)
[![Modrinth Button](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/social_buttons_icon/Modrinth-Button-64.png)](https://modrinth.com/shader/pvp-pack-unified)
[![CurseForge Button](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/social_buttons_icon/Curseforge-Button-64.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/pvp-pack-unified)
[![Ko-fi Button](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/social_buttons_icon/Kofi-Button-64.png)</center>](https://ko-fi.com/titan1um)

![Divider](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/divider_faded/Divider_03.png)

**This resource pack, which is fully built for vanilla, adds various tweaks to boost and greatly enhance your combat gameplay and the awareness of your surroundings (revamped HUD).**

ℹ️*All images* below *and in the* Gallery *were taken in* vanilla Minecraft **1.21.1**

# 📥Installation:
This resource pack adds various tweaks to boost your combat gameplay and the awareness of your sourroundings (revamped HUD). The pack is *made for* **all versions between 1.15 and 26.1 snapshot 10**.

![Divider](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/divider_faded/Divider_03.png)

# ✨Features:
## PvP:
### [Shorter Swords](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/shorter-swords-pack):
⚔️Swords are now smaller and shorter to improve visibility in combat all while keeping the familiar texture.
![Shorter Swords⚔️](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6TWRbRP5/images/e56cb8e6ed9732aeea969e0e048347b501475e87.png)
### Low Fire:
🔥Fire burning is now significantly lower to improve visibility in combat. Fire & soul fire ground fire are also made lower.
![Low Fire🔥](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6TWRbRP5/images/a097ac9b6d4b0602c47239d829a802e285757298.png)
### Low Shield:
🛡️Shields held and non-held are significantly lower to improve visibility in combat.
![Low Shield🛡️](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6TWRbRP5/images/4c9e9ce7778e39cbd4d81d8eff784b707d99ab4a.jpeg)
### No Fishing Hook:
🎣No more hooks bobbing around your screen anymore so you can concentrate on the combat.
![No Fishing Hook🎣](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6TWRbRP5/images/7f864dfcc2e02f77139b3afeebdd2afde992242d.png)
### Old Gaps:
🍎Brings back the old apple textures.
![🍎Old Gaps](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6TWRbRP5/images/e118c6c4851c055ed96bf704a2eea5efc4c63c93.png)
### Bows Charging Animation:
🏹Adds colored animated charging to bows and crossbows for visual feedback!
![🏹Bows Charging Animation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6TWRbRP5/images/08de8b418a8384cff008f6cab6bce1c16e990e90.jpeg)
### Cobwebs Recolored:
🕸️Cobwebs are recolored so that they're easier to detect on the battlefield.
![🕸️Cobwebs Recolored](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6TWRbRP5/images/d3b8e39abae30849a896db995534f8429ceafdf8.png)
### Small Totem Pop:
🗿Totems pop significantly smaller than usual with decreased particles to avoid effecting visibility.
![Small Totem Pop🗿](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6TWRbRP5/images/fac80a2889363b3358f3058472f8955a6433a75d.png)

## Revamped HUD:
### No Pumpkin Blur:
🎃Pumpkin blur is now removed so you can be in the End in peace, or hide from your server's locator bar, all while not having to watch an ugly face all the time!
![No Pumpkin Blur🎃](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6TWRbRP5/images/0a24c23b8b1923aef11a57b1202920dd1c57bc15.png)
### Powdered Snow Visual:
❄️Powdered snow are now highlighted to prevent you from falling or getting trapped into them again!
![❄️Powdered Snow Visual](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6TWRbRP5/images/8112b3cf1f797a99fb224a914986970a84d3e05e.png)
### Chest Visuals:
- 🚨Trapped Chests are now highlighted to prevent you from getting yourself trapped again!
- 🎁Regular and Ender Chests are now bordered with their colors to make them more visible to you!
![Chest Visuals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6TWRbRP5/images/a89e3fa8f3797da1737a15002484a71215daba14.png)
### Tripwire Setup Visual:
🪝Detect tripwire lines from miles away. The texture is replaced from opaque to colored. You won't get booby-trapped again"
![🪝Tripwire Setup Visual](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6TWRbRP5/images/d3b8e39abae30849a896db995534f8429ceafdf8.png)
### Less Freezing:
🧊Sink into powdered snow without your whole screen turning blue! But you won't fall into 
powdered snow anymore right?
![🧊Less Freezing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6TWRbRP5/images/863762051bf026a4659909c893e0313838d89c83.png)
### Old Enchantment Glint:
🪄Brings back the old enchantment glint from versions before 1.19.4.
![🪄Old Enchantment Glint](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6TWRbRP5/images/1feb0b09679f70d3ed11d29b1df706f85e5d0c8c.png)
### Clear Spyglass:
🔭Your spyglass lens is fully cleaned up. Removed old blurry/glassy texture.
![🔭Clear Spyglass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6TWRbRP5/images/a18bd87cc0b786f25be8db68d11646fff85b7b07.png)
### Lighter Withered Hearts
🖤Old trash dark withered hearts replaced with clear lighter ones so you can finally see your heart count when fighting a Wither!
![Lighter Withered Hearts🖤](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6TWRbRP5/images/def0ab49ca5ec423eada3f840df5c098f9fa0e2b.png)

## Other:
- [PvP Crosshair](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pvp-crosshair-bba)
- [Loading bar block breaking animation]((https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pvp-crosshair-bba))
- [Simple wool (Bedwars)](https://modrinth.com/resoucepack/bedwars-improved/)
- No vignette
- No smoke
- No particle explosions
- No particle effects
- No portal overlay
- No eating particles
- Quiet sounds of explosions

## *Coming soon!*
### Clear Liquids:
🔍See through lava and water at ease. No more blur blinding you anymore!

![Divider](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/divider_faded/Divider_03.png)

# 🛠️Versioning:
This ressource pack uses the following versioning system:
- **Base pack:** standard versioning + Minecraft version
  - -> *e.g.* **v1.0.0-1.21.1, v2.4.3-v1.21.8,...**

![Divider](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/divider_faded/Divider_03.png)

Thanks to all the resource packs and their authors, who either licensed their projects under the MIT license or allowed me to use their resource packs!

- [PvP Basics](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pvp-basics)
- [Better Bedwars](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/betterbedwars)
- [Low on Fire](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/low-on-fire)
- [Old Golden Apple](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/old-golden-apple)
- [Loading Bar Breaking Animation Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/loading-bar-breaking-animation-1.8.9-version)

Without these projects and their authors, the PvP Pack - Unified (old name All-in-one PvP Pack) would not have been possible to make. **Special thanks!**

</details>

# 💘 Support me!
To help me and make me develop more fascinating projects, share and recommend this resourcepack. Thank you so much!!!

You can also try my other projects [here](https://modrinth.com/user/Titan1um) or the projects me and Polr made [here](https://modrinth.com/organization/titan1um-x-polr)! :D
